tasks.label: Start App
tasks.command: ha apps stop "local_${input:appName}"; ha apps start "local_${input:appName}"; ha apps logs -f "local_${input:appName}"

tasks.label: Rebuild and Start App
tasks.command: ha apps rebuild --force "local_${input:appName}"; ha apps start "local_${input:appName}"; ha apps logs -f "local_${input:appName}"

tasks.label: Deploy to Real HA (tar over SSH)
tasks.command: tar czf - -C /mnt/supervisor/addons/local/home-assistant-dockhand-app --exclude='.git' . | ssh root@${input:haHost} "tar xzf - -C /addons/local/home-assistant-dockhand-app" && ssh root@${input:haHost} "ha apps rebuild --force local_dockhand && ha apps start local_dockhand && ha apps logs -f local_dockhand"

inputs.description: Name of app (to add your app to this list, please edit .vscode/tasks.json)
Hostname or IP of the real HA instance
